## Step 3 & 5: Predict Runtime Behavior

The current implementation groups by type. Each type has count 3, so each gets the BLOCK_PREMIUM of 60.
- 3 runes → 60 (block applies)
- 3 moonstones → 60 (block applies)
- policyBase = 120
- ceil(120 * 11 / 10) + 5 = ceil(132) + 5 = 132 + 5 = 137

Expected: 137. Actual will be 137. So the test will PASS, not fail.

